hero.sub: An IT company focused on client comfort and upholding professionalism in every aspect of our service.

about.label: About
about.p1: Sundawa Teknologi is an IT company focused on client comfort and needs, while upholding professionalism in every aspect of the services provided.
about.p2: We provide innovative solutions focused on delivering IT solutions that can transform and elevate our clients' businesses.

missions.title: Customer-First Experience
missions.body: Delivering an exceptional experience to every client, prioritizing comfort, satisfaction, and trust in every service.

missions.title: Precision & Efficiency
missions.body: Providing accurate, efficient, and tailored solutions to client needs while maintaining precision at every stage of delivery.

missions.title: Strong Relationships
missions.body: Building lasting partnerships by listening and responding quickly to every client need.

values.label: Values
values.sub: The principles that shape every decision and interaction at Sundawa Teknologi.

items.title: Client Satisfaction First
items.desc: Client satisfaction and needs are the top priority in every action and decision we make.

items.title: Friendly & Comfortable Service
items.desc: Providing a comfortable environment and experience for clients, from first interaction through project completion.

items.title: Reliability & Precision
items.desc: Delivering high-quality services with precision and reliability in every aspect of the business.

items.title: Active Collaboration
items.desc: Encouraging open communication and close collaboration between our internal team and clients for deep mutual understanding.

items.title: Commitment to Professionalism
items.desc: Placing high standards of expertise and work ethics in every aspect of the business.

items.title: Continuous Innovation
items.desc: Driving innovation and improvement in the solutions we offer, in line with technological developments and market needs.

services.label: Services
services.sub: We offer a range of technology solutions tailored to your business needs — from consultation to finished product.

items.title: IT Consultation
items.desc: Get expert consultation on your business's digital needs. We help formulate the right technology strategy.

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.desc: Product and application design using effective and efficient methods, prioritizing intuitive and attractive user experiences.

items.title: Software Testing
items.desc: Trust our experts to conduct the testing your software needs. Ensure your product is bug-free before launch.

items.title: Custom Software
items.desc: Boost business efficiency with software built specifically for your needs — from inventory management to enterprise systems.

items.title: Mobile App
items.desc: Bring your brand identity to a more accessible platform. Responsive and engaging mobile applications.

items.title: Web Development
items.desc: Professional web solutions from landing pages to scalable, modern enterprise platforms.

items.title: IT Outsourcing
items.desc: Supply selected professional IT talent for your team — remote, hybrid, or onsite. Developers, QA, DevOps, to IT Managers.

tech.label: Technology
tech.sub: The modern tech stack we master to deliver the best solutions in every project.

clients.label: Clients
clients.sub: Trusted by companies across various industries to deliver the best technology solutions.

items.name: Oetomo Hospital
items.desc: Integrated hospital information system covering patient management, medical records, and billing.

items.name: PT. Kimu Enam Kemasindo
items.desc: ERP and production management solutions to optimize supply chain and factory efficiency.

items.name: Sistem Informasi Konveksi
items.desc: Garment production management platform from order to real-time delivery tracking.

items.name: Healthcare App Client
items.desc: Mobile health application with telemedicine features and digital medical record management.

contact.label: Contact
contact.waMessage: Hello Sundawa Teknologi, I would like to learn more about your services.

outsource.label: IT Outsourcing
outsource.sub: Build your dream team of developers, QA, DevOps, or IT Managers. Choose position, level, and work mode — we calculate the estimate in real time.
outsource.priceNote: ⚠️ Price excludes BPJS, THR, and operational overhead. Contact us for a formal proposal.
outsource.contactCta: Need a custom team or further consultation?
outsource.infoRemote: Bandung-based talent working remotely for clients anywhere. Best value proposition: competitive price, equivalent quality.
outsource.infoHybrid: A mix of remote and onsite work based on project needs. Our baseline pricing.
outsource.infoOnsite: Talent fully on-site at the client's location. Ideal for projects requiring intensive coordination.
outsource.infoNote: Price excludes BPJS (~7.7%), THR (~8.3%), and operational overhead. Contact us for a formal proposal.
